overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a warrior character walking through a desert canyon at golden hour. The character traverses sandy terrain between massive rock formations in a continuous journey through the arid landscape, with warm sunlight casting long shadows across the canyon walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow desert canyon passage with high rock walls

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through the narrow canyon, following the sandy path between towering rock walls

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with layered sedimentary rock formations
steep rock wall casting shadows across the canyon floor
sandy trail with visible footprints winding through the canyon
rocky canyon walls visible in the far distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow desert canyon passage with high rock walls on both sides. The sandy path shows visible tracks as the character moves forward through the enclosed space, with warm golden hour light illuminating the cliff faces.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening canyon opening into desert valley

events.description: canyon walls recede and the landscape opens into a wider desert valley with panoramic views

agents.ego_description: character continues walking as the canyon opens up, approaching a large isolated rock formation visible in the distance

entered.detail: large isolated rock formation standing prominently in the center of the valley ahead

segments.scene_description: As the canyon opens into a wide desert valley, the character continues along the sandy path. The cliff walls recede into the distance while a prominent rock monolith becomes visible ahead, standing isolated in the center of the expansive landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert valley approaching central monolith

agents.ego_description: character walking toward the large central rock monolith across the open desert sand

entered.detail: small boulders and rocks scattered across the sandy ground
sparse dry vegetation and small shrubs dotting the desert floor

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the large central rock monolith across the open desert valley. The canyon walls now frame the distant background while scattered rocks and sparse dry vegetation appear on the sandy ground near the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow desert passage that gradually expands into a vast, open valley. It begins with the character traversing a sandy path enclosed by towering rock walls, where warm golden hour light illuminates the high cliff faces. As the canyon opens, the restrictive walls recede into the distance, shifting the perspective toward an expansive landscape dominated by a prominent, isolated rock monolith ahead. The scene then broadens further across the desert floor, passing scattered rocks and sparse dry vegetation before the character finally approaches the central monolith under the wide horizon.
